summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TimeTravel Agency webapp. Backend APIs working with AI integration, frontend UI functional with minor issues in booking form destination selection.

validation_issues.issue: Accepts invalid data (empty fields, invalid email) and still creates bookings
validation_issues.impact: Poor data quality, potential security risk

ui_bugs.issue: Destination selection not working properly - shows validation error even after selection

design_issues.issue: French title 'Voyagez a travers le temps' appears without spaces between words

passed_tests: Hero section renders with French title and 2 CTA buttons
Header navigation links scroll to respective sections
Destinations section shows 3 cards in bento grid layout
Destination modals open with video play button and booking CTA
Quiz section completes 4 questions and shows result
AI Chatbot integration working with OpenAI GPT
Footer renders with contact info and navigation links
Mobile hamburger menu works on small viewport
Form validation working for required fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking form destination selection issue - the Select component is not properly updating the form state when an option is chosen. Also implement proper backend validation for booking data.
